rule_details.description: PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager replaced by PoolingAsyncClientConnectionManager for async APIs
CloseableHttpClient replaced by CloseableHttpAsyncClient for async APIs
HttpClients replaced by HttpAsyncClients for async client creation
setConnectionTimeToLive() moved to ConnectionConfig.setTimeToLive() with TimeValue parameter
setConnectTimeout() moved from RequestConfig to ConnectionConfig with Timeout parameter
setSocketTimeout() moved from RequestConfig to ConnectionConfig with Timeout parameter
setDefaultSocketConfig() moved from HttpClientBuilder to connection manager builder
closeExpiredConnections() renamed to closeExpired() in HttpClient 5.x
closeIdleConnections() renamed to closeIdle() in HttpClient 5.x
org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient replaced by org.apache.hc.client5:httpclient5
org.apache.httpcomponents:httpcore replaced by org.apache.hc.core5:httpcore5
org.apache.http package namespace replaced by org.apache.hc in HttpClient 5.x
HttpPost constructor replaced by ClassicRequestBuilder or SimpleRequestBuilder in HttpClient 5.x
EntityTemplate replaced by HttpEntities.create() factory methods in HttpClient 5.x
getStatusLine() removed in HttpClient 5.x; use getCode() for status code
org.apache.http package replaced by org.apache.hc.httpclient5 in HttpClient 5.x
HttpEntityEnclosingRequest replaced by HttpEntityContainer in HttpClient 5.x
getRequestLine() removed; use new RequestLine(request) in HttpClient 5.x
getAllHeaders() renamed to getHeaders() in HttpClient 5.x
HttpRequestBase replaced by HttpUriRequestBase in HttpClient 5.x
BasicHttpContext replaced by HttpCoreContext or HttpClientContext in HttpClient 5.x
addInterceptorLast() replaced by addExecInterceptorFirst() in HttpClient 5.x
setRetryHandler() replaced by setRetryStrategy() in HttpClient 5.x
HTTP_TARGET_HOST constant removed; use HttpClientContext.getHttpRoute().getTargetHost()
URIUtils.normalizeSyntax() removed; use URIBuilder.optimize() in HttpClient 5.x
HTTP_CONNECTION constant removed; use typed context accessors in HttpClient 5.x
SSLConnectionSocketFactory replaced by ClientTlsStrategyBuilder in HttpClient 5.x
setSSLSocketFactory() replaced by setTlsSocketStrategy() on connection manager builder
ManagedHttpClientConnection cast for SSL session replaced by HttpCoreContext.getSSLSession()
